# Evolnex Technologies - LLMs.txt
# https://evolnex.digital/llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models understand our website content and services.

## About Evolnex Technologies
Evolnex Technologies is a premium digital product studio headquartered in Phagwara, Punjab, India.
Founded by Akash Jadon, we engineer high-performance SaaS platforms, web applications, mobile apps,
and enterprise digital products for global clients in the US, UK, Canada, UAE, and India.

## Core Services
- SaaS Engineering & Platform Architecture
- High-Performance Web Development (React, Next.js, Node.js)
- Product Design & UI/UX (Figma, Framer)
- Mobile Application Development (React Native, Flutter)
- Technical SEO & Performance Optimization
- API & Backend Architecture (REST, GraphQL, Microservices)
